title: BlueNetherite+
description: Makes some of netherite Items turn to the color blue
body:
**BlueNetherite+, What is the R-Pack about?**

**BlueNetherite+ Is An Addon For [Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite) (UnOfficial Addon) To Match The Blue Netherite Texture.**

### Features :

**Makes Netherite Scraps, Netherite Ingots To Match The [Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite) Texture-Pack!**

![This is how the netherite scrap looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/250dcc310616118aa6dc8f2aab55e592b7e66b48.png)
![Netherite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0144c708c87c26e85f576d93df80f69ed2d8f58.png)

### Tested on :
**Sodium (Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium Options Included)**

**Custom Minecraft Clients (Feather, Lunar)**
